name: HyperPasskeys
description:
Optional add-on framework for HyperSDK that implements native
WebAuthn passkey create/get inside Godel-managed bank
webviews. Backed by the Secure Enclave + LocalAuthentication
for biometric user verification. Mirrors the Android
hyper-credential-manager module.

Integrating this requires the host app to declare
NSFaceIDUsageDescription in its Info.plist.
